title: Decision-Making Process for Optimization Problems
description: A flowchart illustrating the Judi J Mc method for selecting the appropriate optimization technique in Linear Algebra based on problem constraints and requirements.
relationships: Start with 'Define Problem' -> 'Check Constraints' -> 'Identify Objective' -> Branch based on problem type -> Select appropriate optimization method (Linear/Quadratic Programming) -> Choose solution algorithm (Simplex/Interior-Point) -> Apply optimization principles -> Conduct Sensitivity Analysis
